channel.title: theBalancedBriefNLtech
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from theBalancedBriefNLtech, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: ChatGPT uninstalls surged by 295% after DoD deal
item.description: Many consumers ditched ChatGPT's app after news of its DoD deal went live, while Claude's downloads grew.

item.title: Why Missile Alerts and War Updates Trigger Doomscrolling
item.description: A combination of war alerts, breaking news updates, and algorithmic feeds are trapping users in a threat-monitoring loop.

item.title: Cursor has reportedly surpassed $2B in annualized revenue
item.description: The four-year-old startup saw its revenue run rate double over the past three months, according to one Bloomberg source.

item.title: The Untold Story of the Birth of the iPhone
item.description: Apple turns 50 on April 1. In his new book, Apple: The First 50 Years, David Pogue chronicles the secrecy-laden environment in which Steve Jobs willed...

item.title: L.L.Bean Promo Codes and Deals: Up to 75% Off Outdoor Gear
item.description: Find the best L.L.Bean promo codes and coupons for 10% off your first order, major sale discounts, free shipping on $75+, and extra savings for select...

item.title: How Journalists Are Reporting From Iran With No Internet
item.description: After strikes killed senior Iranian officials, Iran cut off internet access. Journalists are relying on satellite links, encrypted apps, and smuggled ...

item.title: Best Pajamas for Women (2026), WIRED Tested and Reviewed
item.description: After testing 100-plus sets, these are the sleepwear brands that earned permanent spots in my closet and my bed.

item.title: India’s Pronto formalizes house help as its valuation jumps 8x in under a year
item.description: Pronto handles 18,000 daily bookings and plans rapid expansion as it races rivals to digitize India's largely offline home services market.

item.title: Geopolitical drama reportedly stalls IPO of SoftBank-backed PayPay
item.description: The Japan-based company reportedly aimed for a public valuation of at least ¥1.5 trillion ($10 billion).

item.title: Stripe wants to turn your AI costs into a profit center
item.description: Stripe released a preview intended to allow AI companies to easily track, pass through, and make a profit on underlying AI model fees.
